fields.description: Humanity attaches engines to Earth to escape a dying sun but mission goes terribly wrong.

fields.title: Annabelle Comes Home
fields.description: A haunted doll unleashes a night of terror on the Warrens' daughter and her friends.

fields.title: Clash of the Titans
fields.description: Perseus, son of a god, leads a quest to stop the underworld from overtaking the world.

fields.title: Wrath of the Titans
fields.description: Perseus battles to rescue his father Zeus and prevent chaos from destroying the world.

fields.title: Sister Act 2: Back in the Habit
fields.description: Sister Mary Clarence returns to help students form a winning choir.

fields.title: Eragon
fields.description: A farm boy finds a dragon egg and discovers his destiny as a Dragon Rider.
